Consistency
Most Common Mistakes
● Focusing on being consistent with others (which is
related to Social Proof) and not being consistent with
our own past behavior.
● Consistency is powerful when we show that what we
are offering is consistent with what another person
has already said is important to them.
○ It is not doing the same behavior over and over
and expecting success. It isn’t repetition. It is a
consistency in one's beliefs and values.
● Confusing a confirmation yes with an active yes.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
